context.description:
## Objective
Criar script para liquid staking de SOL via Jito (JitoSOL) ou Marinade (mSOL). Módulos: (1) swap SOL→JitoSOL via Jupiter, (2) unstake JitoSOL→SOL, (3) yield tracking no Supabase, (4) integração com crypto-sage /saldo. NÃO executar stake — apenas a infra.

## Context
Portfolio tem 2.03 SOL (~$173) na wallet Solana BYzZUKToZbkfe1snHFHSsTKMTb1SNmyCf8tGYTUgnbr. SOL staking APY ~7%. Crypto-sage já tem Solana connector (src/connectors/solana.mjs) e Jupiter connector (src/connectors/jupiter.mjs). JitoSOL mint: J1toso1uCk3RLmjorhTtrVwY9HJ7X8V9yYac6Y7kGCPn. mSOL mint: mSoLzYCxHdYgdzU16g5QSh3i5K3z3KZK7ytfqcJm7So.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Script sol-staking/ com: stake.py (SOL→JitoSOL via Jupiter), unstake.py (JitoSOL→SOL), tracker.py (yield calculation). Supabase table staking_posi

spawn_params.title: Infra: SOL Liquid Staking Script (Jito/Marinade)
